title: Co-Information Estimator Bias Diagnosis & SPONGE Failure Mechanism Analysis
summary: Demo notebook for the Co-Information Estimator Bias Diagnosis & SPONGE Failure Mechanism Analysis experiment. Generates synthetic XOR datasets, computes CoI matrices using 4 estimation methods (NPEET KSG, raw KSG, binned MI, sklearn KSG), analyzes sign distributions, and diagnoses SPONGE spectral clustering failure on all-negative CoI graphs. Includes eigenspectrum analysis, clustering comparison (unsigned spectral ARI=1.0 vs SPONGE ARI=-0.5), and edge injection tests. Visualizes precomputed full-run results alongside live demo computation with near-original parameters (n=15000/10000). Total compute ~5s.
